mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunk(document_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, source_type, source_id, create_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{tokenCount}, #{sourceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT dc.content FROM document_chunk dc JOIN project_document pd ON pd.id = dc.document_id WHERE pd.project_id = #{projectId} AND pd.status = 1 ORDER BY pd.id, dc.chunk_index
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM document_chunk WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND source_id = #{sourceId}
